game_title: Super Sean 007: Legend of the Seven Gems
status: Full free-to-play game: 15-chapter campaign, two postgame regions and open-ended homestead building.

regions.name: Birthday Village
regions.summary: The cozy hub with Elder Brightbeard, Dave, Bobo's shop, Grandma Berrybun and the village crystal.

regions.name: Sunrise Homestead
regions.summary: A claimable base for building, stations, gardens, Comfort perks, visitors and landmark structures.

regions.name: Mushroom Meadow
regions.summary: The first field region, where Moldor guards the Meadow Gem and the homestead deed.

regions.name: Crystal Cave
regions.summary: A mining cavern rich in Crystal Shards and Ore Chunks, guarded by the Cracked Crystal Guardian.

regions.name: Petro Plains
regions.summary: Machine-strewn plains with Gear Parts, Petroman's recruitment quest and the Petro Titan.

regions.name: Ruushwood
regions.summary: A deep pine forest where Ruush joins after the Elder Treeguard hunt.

regions.name: Moon Shrine
regions.summary: A moonlit temple with Moon Herbs, Haraku's recruitment and the Lunar Shade.

regions.name: Ancient Ruins
regions.summary: The collapsed Gem Guardian capital, filled with relics, mechanisms and Guardian Prime.

regions.name: Bald Moon Tower
regions.summary: Xelar's fortress, containing Xelar's Echo and the final main-story confrontation.

regions.name: Frostpeak Reaches
regions.summary: An icy postgame region with elite demons, rare materials and the Void Succubus Queen.

regions.name: Sunsand Isle
regions.summary: A warm postgame shore with corrupted guards, sea creatures and the Tide Spirit Sovereign.

features: resource gathering and nineteen crafting recipes
local saves, copyable save codes and optional Cloud Sync
privacy: Progress is local by default. Cloud Sync is optional. Third-party ads run only after consent and inside sandboxed frames. Aggregate analytics are cookieless and diagnostics reads are admin-protected.
